differentials.name: Scleral calcifications (a)  in systemic hypercalcemic states (HPT, sarcoidosis, hypervitaminosis D, in chronic renal disease) (b)  in elderly: scleral plaques at insertion of extraocular muscles, esp. medial + lateral rectus mm.
